summary: Iteration 34: P0 Humerus Page Rename & P2 SKU Table Polish fully verified. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed: renamed humerus page shows 'Humerus Bone Plates (Titanium)', 83 SKUs with 9 plate subtypes (actual names not codes), search/filter working (proximal=17, medial=22), pagination (3 pages), CSV export, color-coded side badges, View Brochure links. Cardiovascular product correctly shows Product Name column (no parsed columns).
test_credentials: No credentials needed - catalog endpoints are public
seed_data_creation: None - using existing catalog_products and catalog_skus collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P2 SKU table polish complete. Humerus page renamed from 'Medial Distal Humerus Plates' to '2.7mm-3.5mm LPS Humerus Bone Plates (Titanium)'. 83 SKUs with 9 plate subtypes: Posterolateral Distal (10), Posterolateral Distal w/ Lat Support (20), Medial Distal (12), Medial Distal Metaphyseal (10), Extra-articular Distal (12), Extra-articular Distal Short (2), Proximal (2), Proximal Long (5), Periarticular Proximal Lateral (10). Trauma division now has 43 products (duplicate humerus hidden). SKU table features: sticky header, search/filter, pagination (30/page), CSV export, color-coded side badges (blue=Left, orange=Right), View Brochure links. Cardiovascular products show Product Name column instead of parsed columns.
